2141590.name: DragonBlast Expansion
2141590.description:
Hello guys this is a small supporter pack!

I know it wont change the game that much... and thats intentional...
I wanted to keep this game FTP but also wanted to enable people to buy
a small DLC that has almost no impact ... so this way people will have a way
to help me and support me in keeping making games!

Thanks!

Features:

The buy option on store

  • Ability to buy Life potion that increases life by 10%
  • Ability to buy ATK potion that increases atk by 10%
  • Ability to buy DEF potion that increases def by 10%
2141590.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
